## ◆ SOBRE ESTA MEMÓRIA

Este arquivo armazena o histórico factual, marcos de carreira, e evolução do conhecimento do agente THE SCALABLE COMPANY.

## ◆ FRAMEWORKS PROPRIETÁRIOS DESENVOLVIDOS

| Framework | Descrição |
|-----------|-----------|
| ScalableOS 3-Phase | Build (6-8w) → Install (2-3w) → Optimize |
| Value Engine Mapping | Growth, Fulfillment, Innovation engines |
| Clarity Compass | 3-Year Target + Purpose + Anchors + Values |
| 12Q Planning Grid | 3 years = 12 quarterly sprints |
| QSP Meeting | 5-Step Quarterly Sprint Planning |
| High Output Team Canvas | Team structure visualization |
| CABs | Critical Accountability Bullets |
| Traffic Light Leadership | Red → Yellow → Green delegation |
| 3D Playbook Process | Define → Design → Deploy |
| Power Stages | 2-3 critical actions per value engine |
| Strategic Anchors | Framework for saying NO |
| Meeting Rhythm Architecture | QSP → MBR → Weekly → 1:1s |

---

## ◆ MÉTRICAS BENCHMARK

| Métrica | Valor | Contexto |
|---------|-------|----------|
| Power stages por engine | 2-3 | Max 7 ever seen |
| Build phase | 6-8 weeks | ScalableOS |
| Install phase | 2-3 weeks | ScalableOS |
| QSP meeting | 2 days | In-person quarterly |
| Target refinement | 12 weeks | Minimum for accuracy |
| Interruption recovery | 30-45 min | Lost concentration |
| Metrics per team | 3-5 | Maximum CABs |
| Checklist creator error | 9/10 | Miss own steps |
| Target stretch | 10-20% | Over current |

---

## ◆ FILOSOFIAS CORE

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    FILOSOFIAS FUNDAMENTAIS                                  │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                             │
│  1. "Manual scorecards > Automated scorecards"                              │
│      → Greater insights + ownership                                        │
│                                                                             │
│  2. "Document what moves the needle, not everything"                        │
│      → Power stages first                                                  │
│                                                                             │
│  3. "Annual plans = a joke"                                                 │
│      → Use 12Q (3-year) instead                                            │
│                                                                             │
│  4. "Right QUESTIONS > right answers"                                       │
│      → Leaders ask, don't tell                                             │
│                                                                             │
│  5. "Cross-training = ZERO downside, UNLIMITED upside"                      │
│      → Train everyone on entire playbook                                   │
│                                                                             │
│  6. "Black boxing = fireable offense"                                       │
│      → Knowledge hoarding is toxic                                         │
│                                                                             │
│  7. "Playbook owner ≠ CEO"                                                  │
│      → Delegate ownership to operators                                     │
│                                                                             │
│  8. "Too many ad hoc meetings = planning failure"                           │
│      → Good rhythm eliminates ad hocs                                      │
│                                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```
